headline: Camurus announces expansion of Lilly collaboration
summary: Camurus (NASDAQ STO: CAMX) today announced that Eli Lilly and Company ("Lilly") has exercised its option to include amylin receptor agonists (amylin) in the collaboration and license agreement entered in June 2025. The decision extends Lilly's exclusive, global rights to Camurus' FluidCrystal® technology for the development and commercialization of long acting cardiometabolic drug medicines to an additional compound class.

headline: Lilly Reports Strong Phase 3 Results for Retevmo in Early-Stage Lung Cancer (LLY)
summary: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY) announced positive data from its Phase 3 LIBRETTO-432 trial, showing that Retevmo significantly lowered the risk of disease recurrence or death in patients with early-stage RET fusion-positive non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) following initial treatment. The study found that treatment with Retevmo (selpercatinib) reduced the risk of recurrence or death by 83% compared with placebo, highlighting the drug’s potential role as an adjuvant therapy for patients with

headline: Eli Lilly announces Phase 3 Libretto-432 trial of Retevmo met primary endpoint
summary: Eli Lilly (LLY) and Company announced results from the Phase 3 Libretto-432 clinical trial of Retevmo as adjuvant therapy versus placebo in patients with early-stage rearranged during transfection fusion-positive non-small cell lung cancer, NSCLC. The study met its primary endpoint, demonstrating a highly statistically significant and clinically meaningful improvement in investigator-assessed event-free survival with selpercatinib reducing the risk of disease recurrence or death by 83% versus pl

headline: A Look At Eli Lilly’s Valuation After Strong Momentum In Share Price And Earnings
summary: Recent performance context for Eli Lilly (LLY) Eli Lilly (LLY) has drawn investor attention after a period where the stock rose about 15% over the past month and about 10% over the past 3 months, alongside strong reported revenue and net income figures. See our latest analysis for Eli Lilly. That recent 14.7% 30 day share price return comes on top of a 48.9% total shareholder return over the past year and a very large 5 year total shareholder return, so momentum has been building over both...

headline: Hanmi Signs Licensing Deal with Lilly for sonefpeglutide (LAPSGLP-2 analog)
summary: Hanmi Pharm. Co., Ltd. ("Hanmi") today announced that they have entered into a license agreement for the development, manufacturing and commercialization of Hanmi's biologic drug candidate sonefpeglutide (LAPSGLP-2 analog) with Eli Lilly and Company ("Lilly").
